user.title: Select SRAM AXS Device
user.description: Found nearby SRAM AXS components. Wake the component by pressing a button if it doesn't appear.

abort.no_devices_found: No SRAM AXS devices found nearby. Press a button on the component to wake it, then try again.

low_battery.title: {name} battery is low
low_battery.description: The battery level is {battery}%. Charge the component before your next ride.
